title: Sign in and reach dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in from the login page and land on the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Submit stock request and see it in history as pending
description: Verifies a staff user can create a stock request and the new request appears in the transactions list with a PENDING status.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view transactions
Start creating a new stock request
Select an inventory item for the request
Fill a valid positive quantity into the requested quantity field
Select a department for the request
Fill a short note into the notes field
Verify the newly created request is listed in the transactions history with a PENDING status

title: Approve and issue a pending request and see status update
description: Verifies an admin/approver can approve and issue a pending request and the transaction status updates to APPROVED or COMPLETED.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view transactions
Start creating a new stock request
Select an inventory item for the request
Fill a valid positive quantity into the requested quantity field
Select a department for the request
Find the newly created pending request in the list
Open the approve and issue workflow for the pending request
Fill a valid issued quantity that is less than or equal to the requested quantity into the issued quantity field
Fill valid processor details into the processor details field
Verify the request status is updated to APPROVED or COMPLETED in the transactions list

title: Create a return transaction and see it completed
description: Verifies a user can create a return transaction and the new return appears in the transactions list with a COMPLETED status.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view transactions
Start creating a new return transaction
Select an inventory item to return
Fill a valid positive quantity into the return quantity field
Verify the return transaction is listed with a COMPLETED status

title: Add a new inventory item and see it listed
description: Verifies an admin can create a new inventory item and it appears in the inventory list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open inventory management
Choose to add a new inventory item
Fill "Test Item A" into the item name field
Fill a unique item code into the item code field
Fill a valid positive quantity into the quantity field
Fill "Main Store" into the location field
Verify the new inventory item appears in the inventory list

title: Create a new account and reach dashboard
description: Verifies a new user can switch to signup mode, create an account, and land on the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill a unique valid email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Restock an item and see quantity increase
description: Verifies an admin can restock an inventory item and the available quantity updates accordingly in the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open inventory management
Choose to add a new inventory item
Fill "Restock Item" into the item name field
Fill a unique item code into the item code field
Fill "Restock Shelf" into the location field
Open the restock flow for the created item
Fill "3" into the restock quantity field
Verify the item's available quantity is updated to reflect the restock

title: Filter notifications to unread and mark one as read
description: Verifies a user can filter notifications to show unread items, mark one as read, and see its read status update.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view notifications
Select the filter option to show unread notifications only
Open a notification from the unread list
Verify the notification is now shown as read or removed from the unread-only list

title: Dashboard shows summary stats
description: Verifies the dashboard renders key summary metrics so the user can assess inventory at a glance.

steps.description: Verify summary stat cards are displayed for totals, available units, issued units, and low-stock count

title: Edit an inventory item and see updates reflected
description: Verifies an admin can edit an existing inventory item and the updated details are shown in the inventory list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open inventory management
Choose to add a new inventory item
Fill "Test Item Edit" into the item name field
Fill a unique item code into the item code field
Fill a valid positive quantity into the quantity field
Search for "Test Item Edit" in the inventory search field
Select the item from the results to edit
Fill "Test Item Edit Updated" into the item name field
Verify the inventory list shows the item with the updated name

title: Prevent submitting a request with missing required fields
description: Verifies the request form blocks submission when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view transactions
Start creating a new stock request
Submit the request form without selecting an item
Verify a validation error is visible for the missing required fields

title: Generate low-stock alerts and see them appear in notifications
description: Verifies an admin can trigger low-stock alert generation and newly generated low-stock notifications appear in the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view notifications
Wait for the notifications list to refresh
Verify newly generated low-stock alerts are displayed in the notifications list

title: Prevent creating request with non-positive quantity
description: Verifies the request form prevents using a zero or negative quantity and shows a quantity validation error.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view transactions
Start creating a new stock request
Select an inventory item for the request
Fill 0 into the requested quantity field
Select a department for the request
Verify a quantity validation error is visible and the request is not added to the transactions list

title: Create an allocation to a department
description: Verifies a user can allocate stock to a department and the updated allocation is reflected in the department view.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open department allocation
Start creating a new allocation for a department
Select a department for the allocation
Fill a valid allocation quantity into the quantity field
Fill allocation notes into the notes field
Verify the department's allocation is updated to reflect the new allocation
Verify the new allocation entry appears in the department’s allocation history

title: Reject sign in with invalid credentials
description: Verifies signing in with invalid credentials is blocked and the user remains unable to access the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill invalid credentials into the email and password fields
Verify an authentication error is visible

title: Record disposal or transfer action for an expiring item
description: Verifies a user can select an expiring item, record a disposal or transfer action, and the item shows an updated flagged state afterward.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to expiry management
Open an expiring item from the list
Choose an action type such as disposal or transfer
Verify the item shows an updated flagged or actioned state in the expiry list or item view

title: Search and filter inventory results
description: Verifies users can narrow inventory results using search or filters and see only matching items.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open inventory management
Choose to add a new inventory item
Fill "Filter Target Item" into the item name field
Fill a unique item code into the item code field
Fill a valid positive quantity into the quantity field
Fill "Filter Location" into the location field
Use search or filters to narrow results to the created item
Verify the inventory results show only items matching the applied search or filter

title: Add a new supplier and see it listed
description: Verifies an admin can create a supplier record from the suppliers page and the new supplier appears in the supplier list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to suppliers
Choose to add a new supplier
Fill "Acme Medical Supplies" into the supplier name field
Verify the new supplier appears in the supplier list

title: View department list and current allocations
description: Verifies an authenticated user can view the departments list and see current allocation information displayed.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open department allocation
Verify a list of departments is displayed
Verify each department shows current allocation information

title: Update a compliance item status
description: Verifies a user can update a compliance item’s status and see the updated status reflected in the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open compliance management
Select a compliance item to update
Select a different valid status for the item
Verify the compliance item shows the updated status
Verify the update is reflected in the compliance list view

title: View a department’s allocation details
description: Verifies a user can open a department and see its allocation detail view.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open department allocation
Select a department from the list to view details
Verify the department detail view is displayed
Verify the department allocation breakdown is displayed

title: Delete an inventory item and confirm it is removed
description: Verifies an admin can delete an inventory item and it no longer appears in the inventory list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open inventory management
Choose to add a new inventory item
Fill "Test Item Delete" into the item name field
Fill a unique item code into the item code field
Fill a valid positive quantity into the quantity field
Search for "Test Item Delete" in the inventory search field
Delete the item from the inventory list
Verify the deleted item no longer appears in the inventory list

title: Search or filter suppliers and edit a supplier
description: Verifies an admin can narrow the supplier list using search/filter, edit a supplier, and see the updated supplier information in the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to suppliers
Choose to add a new supplier
Fill "Zenith Pharma Vendor" into the supplier name field
Fill "Zenith" into the supplier search field
Open the supplier from the filtered results to edit it
Fill "Zenith Pharma Vendor Updated" into the supplier name field
Verify the updated supplier information is shown for that supplier in the list

title: View compliance checklists and current statuses
description: Verifies an authenticated user can view compliance checklist items and their current statuses.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open compliance management
Verify compliance checklist items are displayed
Verify each compliance item shows a current status

title: View expiring items list
description: Verifies a user can open the expiry management page and see a list of items nearing expiry with their dates and quantities.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to expiry management
Verify a list of items nearing expiry is displayed with expiry date and quantity information

title: Dashboard charts update when timeframe/metric changes
description: Verifies selecting a different timeframe or metric updates the displayed analytics charts and breakdowns.

steps.description: Select a different timeframe or metric option on the dashboard analytics panel
Verify the usage charts and category breakdown display updates to reflect the selection

title: Delete a supplier from filtered results
description: Verifies an admin can search/filter to find a supplier, delete it, and the supplier is removed from the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to suppliers
Choose to add a new supplier
Fill "Temp Supplier To Remove" into the supplier name field
Fill "Temp Supplier" into the supplier search field
Delete the supplier from the filtered results
Verify the supplier is no longer present in the supplier list

title: Add a compliance note to an item
description: Verifies a user can add a compliance note to an item and the note is visible after saving.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open compliance management
Select a compliance item to update
Fill Compliance note for automated test into the compliance note field
Verify the compliance note is visible for the item
Verify the item reflects the saved update

title: Filter expiring items by timeframe or category
description: Verifies a user can filter the expiry list by a timeframe or category and the list updates to show only matching items.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to expiry management
Verify the expiring items list shows only items matching the selected timeframe and category

title: View audit log list in chronological order
description: Verifies a user can open the audit logs page and see a chronological list of audit events with key event details visible.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to audit logs
Verify a chronological list of audit events is displayed with user, action, and timestamp information

title: Prevent submitting an allocation with empty required fields
description: Verifies the allocation form blocks submission when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open department allocation
Start creating a new allocation for a department
Submit the allocation without filling required fields
Verify required field validation errors are visible
Verify the allocation is not created

title: Prevent allocating zero quantity
description: Verifies the allocation form rejects a zero quantity and does not update the department allocation.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open department allocation
Start creating a new allocation for a department
Select a department for the allocation
Verify a quantity validation error is visible
Verify the department allocation is not updated

title: Prevent allocating a negative quantity
description: Verifies the allocation form rejects a negative quantity and prevents creating the allocation.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open department allocation
Start creating a new allocation for a department
Select a department for the allocation
Verify a quantity validation error is visible
Verify the allocation is not created

title: Filter audit logs by user or action type
description: Verifies a user can apply a user or action-type filter on audit logs and only matching audit events are shown.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to audit logs
Verify only audit events matching the selected filters are displayed

title: Prevent submitting a compliance update with missing required input
description: Verifies the compliance update form shows validation feedback and blocks saving when required input is missing.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open compliance management
Select a compliance item to update
Clear required fields for the update if they are editable
Verify required field validation errors are visible
Verify the compliance item is not updated

title: Supplier list handles no results for search
description: Verifies searching suppliers with a query that matches no records shows an appropriate empty state for the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to suppliers
Fill "NoSuchSupplier_12345" into the supplier search field
Verify an empty state is displayed for the supplier list

title: View scanned item result after a successful barcode scan
description: Verifies a user can start the camera scanner on the inventory page and after a successful scan the matched inventory item is shown in results.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view inventory
Scan a barcode or QR code using the scanner
Verify a matched inventory item is displayed in the inventory results

title: Cancel supplier creation without adding a record
description: Verifies a user can abandon the add-supplier flow without creating a new supplier and the supplier list remains unchanged.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to suppliers
Choose to add a new supplier
Fill "Supplier Not To Save" into the supplier name field
Verify the supplier is not added to the supplier list

title: Show a user-facing message when camera permission is denied
description: Verifies the scanner surfaces an actionable error state when the browser denies camera permission so the user can understand scanning cannot start.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view inventory
Deny the browser camera permission prompt
Verify a camera access error state is displayed with guidance to allow permissions
